updates.title: Updates
updates.autoFetchLabel: Update prices automatically on first open per portfolio
updates.autoFetchHint: Off by default to avoid consuming Yahoo / AlphaVantage API quota on container restarts. Turn on if you want fresh prices whenever you first open a portfolio in a new process.
updates.autoFetchFxLabel: Update exchange rates automatically on first open per portfolio
updates.autoFetchFxHint: Off by default. When enabled, foreign-currency exchange rates are refreshed from the ECB (with Yahoo fallback) the first time you open a portfolio after a server restart, if the cached rates are missing or older than yesterday.
